how_far: Did not clear the game. Reached 40% progress on seed 19, surviving 90 seconds through waves 1-3, killing 19 enemies, reaching level 3, and engaging the boss. Defeated by the boss despite reasonable level and upgrades - suggests boss mechanics are very challenging or damage output still insufficient.
failure_modes: Boss has high HP and/or damage output - level 3 with good upgrades still insufficient to defeat it
Boss may have attack patterns or phases requiring specialized knowledge to avoid
Damage scaling doesn't catch up to boss HP even with aggressive damage upgrade selection
Most seeds (80%+) fail to reach wave 3 due to wave 2 being a difficult gauntlet with high enemy density
lessons: Adaptive dodging based on health state (perpendicular dodge when low HP) improves survival
Collecting items aggressively (350px range) is key to leveling up and gaining survivability
Health-aware upgrade selection (prioritize health when <40% HP) extends survival
Direct boss pursuit only viable at level 3+, otherwise maintain safe mid-field positioning
Wave progression: wave 1 has sparse enemies, wave 2 is dangerous gauntlet, wave 3 has boss
Rarity-weighted upgrade scoring (orange=4x multiplier) combined with keyword matching works well
Some seeds (4,7,15) are nearly unwinnable - early enemy placement and item drops critical
